name: @laude/studio
description: LaudStudio — the personal-domain production app: real extraction pipeline (Python sidecar), local-first SQLite store + audio files, local HTTP service (catalog/audio for LauDJ, extraction jobs, mint-or-link bridge). NOTE: intentionally CommonJS (no "type":"module") — chordsheetjs v12 has no ESM exports map, so @laude/chords only loads via tsx's CJS interop.
